song.title: In the Stillness of the Night
song.author: Kelly Scaletta
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6
song.lyrics: [V1] . D G In the stillness of the night, . D G He kneels and prays, “If there’s a way, .D G A D A Then Father, take this cup from Me.” . D G So lonely in His fight, . D G He does decide that He will die. .D G A D G D Oh, and He chose to drink this cup for me. [V2] . D G By the kiss upon His cheek, . D G He is betrayed, then led away, .D G A D A Without a protest to their lies. . D G They cursed this Lamb so meek, . D G As they beat Him and spit on Him. .D G A D G D Oh, and He chose to drink this cup for me. [V3] . D G And then to Pilate led, . D G Who knows they lie but still decides, .D G A D A This innocent to crucify. . D G With thorns they crown His head. . D G They strip Him bare and scourge Him there. .D G A D G D Oh, and He chose to drink this cup for me. -!! [V4] . D G While all their pain He bears, . D G They just hate Him, and they bait Him, . D G A D A “Oh Son of God come down from there!” . D G In love He offers prayers, . D G For them refuse the gall which soothes. .D G A D G D Oh, and He chose to drink this cup for me. [V5] . D G But the crisis of His plight, . D G Reveals His cry, “My Father why .D G A D A Is it that You’ve forsaken Me?” . D G Sin in the Father’s sight, . D G By God denied my Savior dies. .D G A D G D Oh, and He chose to drink this cup for me. [V6] . D G Then it was in the end, . D G That one who saw exclaimed in awe, . D G A D A “This man the Son of God must be.” . D G And what of you, my friend, . D G Would you believe? Would you receive? .D G A Oh, that He chose to drink this cup for… .D G A D G D Oh, that He chose to drink this cup for you.
